name: CondPPM_1.015784
author: Anmar Hindi
headline_metric_description: byte-level conditional-PPM mixture BPB on FULL val (all 9,662,464 tokens / 32,756,252 canonical bytes per seed; cppm chunks all-gathered across all 8 ranks before rank-0 PPM byte-state advancement). Sigmoid gate alpha=15 beta=0.80. P_NN(byte_0|history) is the proper marginal of the SP8192 softmax via per-position first-byte mask selection: mask_no_space when prev IS boundary, mask_with_space otherwise — no per-token uniform-split fallback for the include_space case. C2 holds for every position regardless of leading-space prepend status. Forensic evidence per seed: 'cond_ppm tokens=9662464 bytes=32756252 cond_mix_bpb=...' line in train_seed{42,1337,314}.log.
